title: 12 inch Happy Birthday Confetti Balloons Premium Quality Age Printed Balloons Birthday Party Decoration Themes Pack of 10 Silver colour 18th Birthday
features: Finest Quality Balloons: Modern confetti balloons made from high quality eco-friendly natural latex. Can be filled with air/helium. These balloons are comparatively thicker than average balloons and hence more durable, lasting up to more than 12 hours
Size and Colour: These balloons are 12 inch in diameter when inflated and are available in multiple vibrant themed colours and age specific prints

Decorate Your Birthday Party Like A Pro: Give your parties that premium look with outstanding balloon colour themes and décor. Add the finishing touch to your celebration with balloons in your chosen theme. They make excellent table centrepieces when filled with helium.

How to use: Stretch the balloons before inflation simply use the funnel included to slide the desired amount of confetti in to each balloons. Confetti made them look very festive it won't interfere with the functionality of blowing up, getting the static from hair to make the confetti stick to the sides of the balloons.

Care Instructions: DO NOT inflate the balloons over 90% to prevent popping avoid direct sunlight, and keep away from sharp objects and excessive friction. It is highly recommended to use pump inflation. We send few extra balloons if the other balloons have hole or damage. For any queries, do not hesitate to contact us
